data.description:
## What
First Tier E cluster (E0): build a real argparse CLI as a NEW module `src/rebar/_cli/` (entrypoint NOT
cut over yet — `cli.py:main` keeps delegating to the bash dispatcher until E1), so the surface can be
proven byte-identical before the cutover. Reuse the in-process functions the library already exports
(`rebar._reads`, `rebar._commands`, `rebar._engine_support`); for commands not yet ported (category B),
the argparse arm TRANSITIONALLY subprocesses the dispatcher exactly as today. No deletions in E0.

Deliverables:
- `tests/golden/cli_help/` — captured byte-exact goldens from the CURRENT bash dispatcher: the overview
  (`rebar`, `rebar help`, `rebar --help`, `rebar -h`), every `rebar <cmd> --help`, and the
  unknown-subcommand + no-arg error paths (stdout/stderr/exit each).
- `src/rebar/_cli/__init__.py` (+ small submodules under the 800-LOC cap): argparse parser that
  (1) reproduces the overview/per-command help/error output byte-identically via a golden-as-package-data
  help action (golden file is the single source of truth, no hand-copied table), (2) owns parsing/
  validation/error exits, (3) dispatches per-command to in-process (cat A) or transitional subprocess
  (cat B), (4) keeps the `reconcile` arm.
- The auto-init/freshness MIDDLEWARE: port `_ensure_initialized` (dispatcher rebar:167-235) — per-command
  full vs `--init-only` vs skip; reuse in-process `rebar._store.sync`; auto-init via the ported/whichever
  init path; same `/tmp/.ticket-sync-<md5>` throttle marker.
- `tests/interfaces/test_cli_argparse.py`: asserts help goldens + per-command stdout/stderr/exit parity
  vs a captured-bash baseline across a fixed scenario matrix (text + `--output json`).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `src/rebar/_cli/` argparse CLI built; help/overview/error output byte-identical to the bash dispatcher (goldens)
- [ ] Auto-init/freshness middleware reproduces `_ensure_initialized` semantics (full/--init-only/skip, throttle marker)
- [ ] Category-A commands dispatch in-process; category-B arms transitionally subprocess the dispatcher
- [ ] `cli.py:main` entrypoint UNCHANGED (still bash) — no cutover, no deletions in E0
- [ ] `tests/interfaces/test_cli_argparse.py` green; full non-integration suite stays green
- [ ] Module-size policy honored (200-500 target, 800 cap, no <100-LOC shards)
data.title: E0: argparse cli.py skeleton + help/error goldens + auto-init middleware (no cutover)
